subparts.text: Define the CIA triad of Network Security.
Explain the use of Integer Factorisation in RSA.
What are the properties of cryptographic hash function?
What is specification-based intrusion detection modelling?
Briefly explain the 3 components of intrusion detection system.

questions.question_text: What is hybrid access policy? Explain Chinese wall model in detail with suitable example.

subparts.text: Alice can use only the shift cipher on her computer to send a message to a friend. Shift Cipher: |P|=|C|=|K|=26 Encryption: c = mod 26 Decryption: p = mod 26 She thinks that her message will be more secure if she encrypts the message two times, each time with a different key. i) What is the equation for encryption and decryption now? ii) Is she right in her security assumption? Defend your answer.

Define the type of attack in each of the following cases. Briefly explain why. 1) A student breaks into a professor’s office to obtain a copy of the next test. 2) A student sends thousands of emails per day to the school website server using a phony email address.
What is the role of salting in password security?
How memory consuming password hashing algorithm resist dictionary attack? Explain with suitable example
Explain Diffie Hellman Key Exchange with suitable equations.
Explain Man-in-the-middle attack on DHKE with suitable equations.

questions.question_text: Explain the lifecycle of a virus with the help of a pseudocode.

subparts.text: Write short notes on: i) Virtual machine monitor ii) Sandboxing

questions.question_text: Define DMZ server and justify its role in a computer network. Explain in detail the role of four servers residing inside the DMZ server.
